description: Returns the list of Budget Change Histories for a given project

budget_code.description: The Work Breakdown Structure code made up of segment values, concatenated by the set delimiter

description.description: The description of the Budget code

type.description: Readable or formatted name of the budget entity

column.description: Readable or formatted name of the column changed

created_at.description: The date and time the change was made, formatted as a string

created_by.description: The name of the user who made the change, formatted as a string

new_value.description: Value of the column after change

old_value.description: Value of the column before change

schema.description: Request body for fetching change histories with filtering options. All filters within a single filter object are combined with OR condition.

filters.description: A collection of named filters to apply to the change history query. Currently only supports the `segments` filter.

segments.description: An array of segment filter objects. Each object specifies the segment ID, the tier (if applicable), and the array of segment-option IDs to filter by.
